title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 1: Free and Easy Wandering
description: Chapter 1 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 1 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: In the northern darkness there is a fish, and his name is Kun. The Kun is so huge I don't know how many thousand li he measures. He changes and becomes a bird whose name is Peng. The back of the Peng measures I don't know how many thousand li across, and when he rises up and flies off, his wings are like clouds all over the sky.
